summary: Iteration 186 testing complete: Science/History Avenues, E-Bike Simulator, Circular Economy. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Fixed Body parameter issue in /api/science-history/economy/purchase endpoint. All frontend UI components verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: avenues.py now has 6 avenues: mathematics, art, thought, biometrics, science, history
Science avenue (The Alchemist) includes Botanical Lab (5 sims) and E-Bike Engineering (2 sims)
History avenue (The Chronicler) includes History modules (4) and Geology modules (3)
Circular Economy marketplace has 8 items purchasable with Kinetic Dust or Science Resonance
resonance-check and equilibrium now include all 6 avenues
Heart Rate Sync challenge ties BPM to planetary depth frequencies
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 186 Science/History/Economy features all working. Test user has: 188 Kinetic Dust, 62 Science Resonance, 289 Combined Resonance. User owns Carbon Fiber Fork Upgrade and 26x4.8 Fat Tire Set from shop. Botanical Lab simulations: aquafaba_meringue mastered. History/Geology Q&A modules working with correct answers: egyptian (365-day calendar), crust (thinnest layer). Auth flow: use /auth page, dismiss trial modal with 'Continue with free plan'.

backend_apis.GET /api/avenues/overview: Returns 6 avenues including science and history

bug_fixed.root_cause: Body parameter item_id was not using embed=True, causing FastAPI to expect raw string instead of JSON object
bug_fixed.fix: Added embed=True to Body(...) parameter: item_id: str = Body(..., embed=True)
